title: Franky and the Factory Fight
description: Pages 8–12 focus on franky and the factory fight, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as the battles against Doflamingo's officers intensify as the allies begin turning Dressrosa's chaos into victories.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: GRIND... CREAK (REAK...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: UWAAH! Pica-SAMA has taken over the Plateau!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You're... you're the ridiculous one, pirate Hunter!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Pikkya- Pikkya- Pikkya- Rara...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: So... you thought you had escaped the wrat-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Was that your laugh just now?! Did you actually just laugh like that?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What if it was!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You have a problem-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: It was just so fucking ridiculous that it blew my mind!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Doking fun of Pica-sama is a friggin' death wish!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: "Charlie- Stone"!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Heh...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: The bigger, the better... I can't wait to dig my blades into you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Hey, Pica!! Mind your surroundings! We're fighting here too, y'know!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: "Hakaihow"!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: KyaAA-!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Don't go letting your eyes wander elsewhere, shortly!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: HAAH

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Just because we're both enemies?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: TADA!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: What-?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Why didn't you come out and tell me this before?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: I still have no idea what you're talking about!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Don't play dumb with me!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: I'm gonna take that heart of yours!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: saying things like you'll "steal my heart"...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Kakkakakakakakakakakakaka! I ain't letting go of this hand!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: that you'll "hold my hand"...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: You think you can keep up with me!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Or to "Come with me!"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: If you're going to come after me so earnestly,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: Little things like what side we're on shouldn't matter!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: Need me, don't you!??

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: Ehh??

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: Whoa- Iin!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: I've found some footin'!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: I've already taken care of that giant, hajrudin! My next prey will be-iiiin...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: Ah! That's...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: RORDOA ZORO!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: against the great Mach Vise,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: Even the Warriors of Elbaf ain't shit!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: My dream is to become the King of all Giants...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: yet what does that matter? I lost the Tourna- ment...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: I was made into a toy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: I was saved...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: And I can't even repay my Saviors!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: How pathetic! If I really were ready to die to repay that debt...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: NIIIIN!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: TON TON!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #51
dialogue.text: Why am I still alive!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #52
dialogue.text: Is this the extent of my gratitude!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #53
dialogue.text: Here I come, RORONOA! Thousand-ton destruction VISE!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #54
dialogue.text: that bastard...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #55
dialogue.text: forgive me, but... leave him to me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #56
dialogue.text: Hajru- Diiiiiiin!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #57
dialogue.text: Oi Oiiiiin! You still haven't bitten the dust!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #58
dialogue.text: I guess I've just gotta get heavier- Iin!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #59
dialogue.text: 10,000 Tom Hell Vise!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #60
dialogue.text: You OughTTA still have some bones left for me to break!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #61
dialogue.text: the dead are of no use to any- one, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #62
dialogue.text: If I have even a single arm left, I can take down this guy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #63
dialogue.text: Take this! The force of this life!

summary: Franky and the Factory Fight advances the Dressrosa story through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
